arts.ttl: Report: Patrick Dorgu was not Ruben Amorim’s first choice, Inter star derails plans with transfer decision
arts.sum: Federico Dimarco told Manchester United that he was very happy at Inter during the January transfer window. A report from FCInterNews reveals that Ruben Amorim is a huge admirer of the full-back and even attempted to sign him during the January transfer window.
